member.name: T:MonadoBlade.Core.Abstractions.IService
member.summary: Marker interface for all service abstractions in the system.

member.name: T:MonadoBlade.Core.Abstractions.IInitializable
member.summary: Base interface for services that require initialization.

member.name: T:MonadoBlade.Core.Abstractions.ILifecycleService
member.summary: Base interface for services that manage their lifecycle.

member.name: P:MonadoBlade.Core.Abstractions.ILifecycleService.IsInitialized
member.summary: Indicates whether the service is initialized and ready.

member.name: T:MonadoBlade.Core.Configuration.ConfigurationExtensions
member.summary: Configures application settings from appsettings.json files.

member.summary: Creates an IConfiguration instance from appsettings.json.

member.name: M:MonadoBlade.Core.Configuration.ConfigurationExtensions.GetSection``1(Microsoft.Extensions.Configuration.IConfiguration,System.String)
member.summary: Binds configuration section to a strongly-typed object.

member.summary: Registers core infrastructure services into the dependency injection container.

member.name: T:MonadoBlade.Core.Logging.LoggingConfiguration
member.summary: Configures and manages Serilog logging for the application.

member.summary: Creates a configured logger instance with console and file sinks.
